> Use a short descriptive branch name and a neutral PR title such as `docs: clarify npm bootstrap publish`.
> Do not prefix branch names or PR titles with tool or assistant names.

## Checks

- [ ] docs are updated when public behavior changes
- [ ] release-facing notes are included when the change should be mentioned later
- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] demo still looks right in the consumer you care about
